decontamination_notes: Sourced from the MIT-licensed `inflection` library (https://github.com/jpvanhal/inflection). repo/inflection.py is the verbatim upstream file at commit 1969b3a06a9ff06d023863e388cf8af01978d297, with its LICENSE preserved. The bug (titleize() only capitalizing words that start with an ASCII a-z letter) is upstream issue #33 (https://github.com/jpvanhal/inflection/issues/33), fixed in commit e32443bb7dc1ba91a15336b5baab908d25f4b93a on 2020-04-06. NOT DECONTAMINATED: this fix predates the training cutoffs of the models under evaluation, so a model may reproduce it from memory rather than reason it out; scores on this task must be read with that caveat (the report's integrity section flags runs scored against it).
